title: Floating UI — Tooltip, Popover, Dropdown Positioning
insights: Evolution of Popper.js. Created by the same author. 3KB. Supports web, React Native, Canvas. Hooks-based React integration. flip, shift, offset, arrow middleware. Framework-agnostic. Used by Radix, MUI, HeroUI. The modern replacement for Popper — all major libraries moved to it.

title: adobe/react-spectrum GitHub
insights: Monthly releases throughout 2025. 13k+ stars. Includes React Aria hooks (low-level), React Aria Components (mid-level), React Spectrum (styled), Internationalized date utilities. Most rigorous accessibility implementation in React ecosystem.

title: cmdk (⌘K) — Fast Command Menu by Paco Coursey
insights: 12.5k+ stars. Used in Vercel dashboard, Linear, shadcn/ui Command component. Headless, unstyled. Handles filtering/sorting automatically. Works as combobox + command palette. Performance: good for 2k-3k items. composable: Command.Input, Command.List, Command.Item, Command.Group.

title: shadcn-ui/ui GitHub Repository
insights: 75k+ stars. Registry directory with community components. Component registry system with schemas. Main source for CLI tooling, component source code, and contributing patterns.

title: React Aria — Adobe's Headless Accessibility Hooks
insights: 50+ hooks for building accessible components. Not just primitives — full interaction layer: keyboard, mouse, touch, screen reader. Includes color picker hooks (useColorWheel, useColorArea), date picker hooks (useDateRangePicker), grid/tree hooks. Used by HeroUI, Adobe Spectrum. WCAG 2.2 AA out of the box.

title: React Hook Form — Performant Form Library
insights: 12KB gzipped. Zero dependencies. 42.8k stars. 2M+ weekly downloads. Uncontrolled inputs — minimal re-renders. register(), useForm(), useFieldArray(), useFormContext(). Works with any UI library via Controller. Zod/Yup/Valibot schema validation. The standard form library for new React projects.

title: React Aria Components — 50+ Accessible Headless Components
insights: Adobe's headless accessible primitives. 50+ components. Recent additions: Toast, Tree, Virtualizer, Autocomplete. Handles ARIA roles, keyboard events, focus management, i18n out of the box. Spectrum 2 stable in 2025 — major visual update. First-class color picker suite (ColorArea, ColorSlider, ColorWheel, ColorField, ColorSwatch).

title: Storybook — Component Workshop for Design Systems
insights: Industry standard for component documentation. IBM, Shopify, Airbnb, BBC all publish design systems as Storybook sites. 2025: MCP server for React (Storybook MCP) lets AI agents reuse existing components. Controls addon for live prop editing. ArgTypes for API documentation.

title: TanStack Table v8 — Headless Data Grid
insights: 15KB gzipped. Headless — you bring the UI. Features: sorting, filtering, pagination, row selection, column visibility, column resizing, row grouping, virtualization (via @tanstack/react-virtual), column pinning. Used at Linear, Notion. Works with any UI library including shadcn.

title: shadcn/ui — Introduction and Philosophy
insights: Not a library. Open code model — you own the source. Works with any React framework. AI-model friendly because components are in your codebase. Foundation of the modern React component distribution pattern.

title: shadcn/ui — Full Component List (Accordion to Sonner)
insights: Copy-paste not npm — source lives in your repo. 50+ components built on Radix primitives + Tailwind. CLI registry (shadcn add) with namespaced registries in CLI 3.0 (Aug 2025). August 2025: CLI 3.0, MCP server, December 2025: npx shadcn create with 5 visual styles.

title: Radix UI Primitives — Full Component List
insights: 28 unstyled, accessible primitives. Foundation of shadcn/ui. Every component follows WAI-ARIA pattern spec. Install individually. Accordion, Alert Dialog, Avatar, Checkbox, Collapsible, Context Menu, Dialog, Dropdown Menu, Form, Hover Card, Label, Menubar, Navigation Menu, Popover, Progress, Radio Group, Scroll Area, Select, Separator, Slider, Switch, Tabs, Toast, Toggle, Toggle Group, Toolbar, Tooltip.

title: Ariakit Homepage — Toolkit for Accessible UIs
insights: Open-source toolkit for building accessible web apps. Low-level React components + hooks. Used in major CMS platforms. Strong composability story. ARIA authoring practices implemented correctly.

title: Ariakit — Accessible React Primitives (formerly Reakit)
insights: Formerly Reakit. Unstyled, accessible headless primitives. Used by WordPress Gutenberg, WooCommerce. React Advanced 2025 showcase. Integration with React 19 async patterns. Composite, Combobox, Menu, Popover, Select, Dialog, Tooltip, Tab, Disclosure. More composable API than Radix.

title: Ark UI — 45+ Headless Components on Zag.js State Machines
insights: Built on Zag.js finite state machines. 45+ components. Works in React, Vue, Solid, Svelte — same API. Predictable behavior guaranteed by state charts. Foundation of Chakra UI v3 and Park UI. DatePicker, RangeSlider, Combobox, FileUpload, NumberInput, PinInput, RatingGroup, ColorPicker, AngleSlider.

title: Base UI 1.0 — MUI's Headless Component Library (35 components)
insights: Stable v1.0 shipped 2025. 35 unstyled, accessible components. From creators of Radix + Floating UI + Material UI. Named slots for customization. Zero styles — just behavior. Context Menu, Combobox, Autocomplete, Drawer, Number Field, Meter, Progress, Slider. Strong competitor to Radix Primitives.

title: Chakra UI v3 — Complete Rewrite
insights: v3 is a complete rewrite. 25+ new components. Open compound components. Recipe system (like Panda CSS variants). CSS animations replaces framer-motion dependency. New components from Ark UI. Moved to zero-runtime approach. RSC compatible.

title: cmdk — Documentation and Live Demo
insights: Official demo showcasing keyboard-driven command interface. Dark mode support. Shows integration patterns with Dialog for modal command palette. Key component for power-user HR workflows: quick candidate search, job creation shortcuts.

title: OpenStatus Data Table — shadcn + TanStack with Faceted Filters
insights: Production data table with faceted filters, sorting, infinite scroll, SSR. Built on TanStack Table + shadcn/ui. Installable via CLI. No library lock-in. Shows advanced filter patterns: multi-value faceted, date range filter, text search. Reference implementation.

title: React DayPicker — Accessible Calendar Component
insights: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant. Multiple selection modes: single, multiple, range. Works with date-fns. shadcn/ui Calendar component is built on react-day-picker. Input integration via DayPickerInput. Localization support. One of top 3 recommended date pickers for 2025.

title: @dnd-kit — Modern Drag and Drop for React
insights: 10KB core. WCAG 2.1 AA — keyboard drag and drop. Sensor system: mouse, touch, keyboard. Sortable preset (@dnd-kit/sortable) for lists/kanban. Accessibility announcements for screen readers. react-beautiful-dnd deprecated by Atlassian — dnd-kit is the migration target. Modifiers for constraints, snap-to-grid.

title: react-resizable-panels — Resizable Panel Groups by Brian Vaughn
insights: shadcn/ui Resizable component uses this. Horizontal/vertical orientation. Min/max constraints, snap, keyboard resize, double-click to reset, layout persistence. Accessible via keyboard. By same author as react-window and react-virtualized.

title: IBM Carbon Design System GitHub
insights: IBM's production design system with @carbon/react. 100+ components. Enterprise data grid (DataTable with server-side), AILabel integration, Fluid Form, Structured List, TreeView, Tearsheet. Used in IBM Cloud, IBM Watson products. v11 active.

title: chakra-ui/ark GitHub — 3k+ Stars
insights: 3k+ stars. 45+ components on Zag.js state machines. Framework parity: React, Vue, Solid, Svelte. Unique components: AngleSlider, ColorPicker, DatePicker, FileUpload, NumberInput, PinInput, RatingGroup, Signature Pad, Timer, Tour. Most comprehensive headless library.

title: Sonner — Opinionated Toast for React by Emil Kowalski
insights: 2-3KB gzipped. Zero dependencies. Used as official toast in shadcn/ui. toast.success(), toast.error(), toast.loading(), toast.promise(). Stacked toasts with rich UI. No provider needed — just import and call. The new standard for React toast.

title: Vaul — React Drawer Component by Emil Kowalski
insights: Vaul is the drawer/bottom sheet component used in shadcn/ui. Built on Radix Dialog. Snap points support (iOS-style magnetic snapping). Background scaling. Supports top/bottom/left/right directions. Swipe-to-dismiss. Critical for mobile-first HR apps. 8k+ stars.

title: react-colorful — 2.8KB Color Picker Component
insights: 2.8KB gzipped. WAI-ARIA compliant. HexColorPicker, RgbColorPicker, HslColorPicker, HsvColorPicker. HexColorInput for text entry. Zero dependencies. Most recommended standalone color picker for new React projects.

title: primer/react GitHub Repository
insights: v38 active development. Discussion #7086 covers the styled-components → CSS Modules migration rationale. Valuable for understanding performance trade-offs in large component libraries.

title: radix-ui/primitives GitHub — Maintained by WorkOS
insights: Now maintained by WorkOS after Radix acquired. 17k+ stars. Core dependency for shadcn/ui, HeroUI, cmdk, vaul, and most modern React component libraries.

title: tremorlabs/tremor GitHub — 16k+ Stars
insights: 16k+ stars. Vercel-owned. Copy-paste like shadcn. 35+ components + 300 blocks. Components: AreaChart, BarChart, LineChart, DonutChart, ScatterChart, SparkAreaChart, SparkBarChart, BarList, Tracker, ProgressBar, KPICard, Badge, Bold, Table, MultiSelect, DateRangePicker.

title: HeroUI — Modern Tailwind React Component Library
insights: 75+ components, Tailwind CSS v4, compound component architecture. Theme builder for visual customization. Pro tier with 200+ templates. Works with Next.js, Remix, Astro, Vite, Laravel.

title: HeroUI (formerly NextUI) — 75+ Components
insights: Rebranded from NextUI to HeroUI Jan 2025. 75+ components. Built on React Aria + Tailwind CSS v4. December 2025 release: ButtonGroup, DateField, ErrorMessage, SearchField, TagGroup, TimeField. CSS-first theming with OKLCH tokens. MCP server for AI development. Apache 2.0 license.

title: Rich Text Editor Framework Choice 2025 — Liveblocks Analysis
insights: TipTap vs Lexical vs Slate vs ProseMirror vs BlockNote. TipTap: ProseMirror wrapper, best DX, tree-shakeable packages, supports collaboration. Lexical: Meta, fastest performance. Slate: React-only, no UI. BlockNote: Notion-style, batteries-included UI. ProseMirror: foundation layer, no React integration. Recommendation: TipTap for most, Lexical for raw performance.

title: Mantine — Full React Component Library (90+ components)
insights: 90+ components. Packages: @mantine/core, @mantine/dates, @mantine/tiptap (RTE), @mantine/charts, @mantine/notifications, @mantine/spotlight (cmdk-style). All MIT licensed. Strong TypeScript. One of few libraries with built-in charts AND rich text editor AND date pickers in one ecosystem.

title: Mantine DatePickerInput — Input + Calendar Combo
insights: Combines text input with calendar popover. Supports all DatePicker props. Works with date-fns, luxon, dayjs adapters. Key component missing from basic antd setups.

title: Mantine DatePicker — Range, Multiple, Week Numbers
insights: Mantine v7 DatePicker supports type=multiple and type=range, withWeekNumbers, highlightToday, and custom presets prop. @mantine/dates package. One of the most complete date picker implementations in React.

title: Mantine DateTimePicker — Full DateTime with Time
insights: DateTimePicker supports time selection with date. Inherits all DatePicker props. Critical for HR scheduling: shift start/end times, appointment slots.

title: Motion — JavaScript and React Animation Library Homepage
insights: motion/react import. 120fps via Web Animations API. AnimatePresence for exit animations. LayoutAnimation for shared element transitions. Scroll-linked animations. 330+ pre-built snippets. v12 with React 19 support and OKLCH colors.

title: Motion for React — Animation Library (formerly Framer Motion)
insights: Renamed from framer-motion to motion in 2025. Import from motion/react. Web Animations API + ScrollTimeline for 120fps. JavaScript fallback for spring physics. v12: oklch/oklab color support, React 19 concurrent mode. AnimatePresence for exit animations. 330+ pre-built animation snippets.

title: Material UI v6 — 100+ Material Design Components
insights: v6 stable with Pigment CSS (zero-runtime CSS-in-JS), CSS Variables via cssVariables flag, Grid v2 with CSS gap, React 19 support. 100+ components. v7 planned H1 2025 with ESM improvements. @mui/x for advanced: DataGrid, DatePickers, Charts, TreeView. Most used React component library globally.

title: MUI X DateRangePicker — Enterprise Date Range
insights: MUI X premium component. Static and popup variants. Multi-calendar display. Timezone support via AdapterDayjs/Luxon. Controlled + uncontrolled. Date validation with min/max/disabled dates. Best-in-class for complex enterprise date range needs.

title: GitHub Primer React — 80 Components
insights: 80 components. v38 migrated from styled-components to CSS Modules — reduces JS bundle, enables RSC. Developer-first design system. ActionList, ActionMenu, DataTable, NavList, TreeView, SplitButton, Timeline, UnderlineNav. Battle-tested by millions of GitHub users daily.

title: PrimeReact — 90+ Enterprise Components (Free)
insights: 90+ components. Dual mode: themed (Material, Bootstrap) or unstyled (Tailwind). Unique components: TreeSelect, OrgChart, Terminal, Gantt (via PrimeGantt), SpeedDial, Steps/Wizard. 400+ PrimeBlocks for rapid scaffolding. DataTable with sorting/filtering/grouping/editing/export/virtualScroll. CommandMenu, ColorPicker, InputOTP, InputTags in alpha.

title: React Aria Autocomplete — New Alpha Component 2025
insights: New in Jan 2025 release (alpha). Unlike Combobox, Autocomplete allows free-form text with optional suggestions. Enables Searchable Menus, Searchable Selects, Command Palettes. Critical pattern for HR: live candidate search, job title autocomplete.

title: React Aria Virtualizer — New in 2025
insights: New Virtualizer component added to React Aria in 2025. Framework for virtualizing collections (list, grid, table). Integrated accessibility — virtualized rows still accessible to screen readers. Key gap in many virtualization libraries.

title: React Aria usePopover — Accessible Popover
insights: usePopover handles ARIA association between trigger and popover, focus management (focus moves in on open, returns on close), content hidden from AT while closed. Positioned via Floating UI internally. Pattern for building accessible tooltips, dropdowns, comboboxes.

title: Carbon Components React — Storybook Documentation
insights: Interactive component catalog. Shows all Carbon components with live props. DataTable with sorting, filtering, pagination, batch actions. Notification types. Full DatePicker with calendar. ComboBox with async loading.

title: Recharts — Composable React Chart Library
insights: 20k+ stars. SVG-based. LineChart, BarChart, AreaChart, PieChart, RadarChart, ScatterChart, ComposedChart. Composable: wrap primitives inside containers. Used by our existing antd setup. Works well with TailwindCSS. Mantine Charts package wraps Recharts.

title: Storybook MCP for React — AI-Aware Component Documentation
insights: Storybook MCP exposes component metadata (stories, API, docs) to AI agents. Prevents AI from inventing new patterns when existing components exist. Direct relevance to EAIP frontend catalog: agents can query available components before generating code.

title: TanStack Table — Virtualized Infinite Scroll
insights: Combines TanStack Table + TanStack Query + TanStack Virtual. Server-side data fetching with smooth infinite scroll UX. Pattern for paginated APIs that appear seamless.

title: TanStack Table — Virtualized Rows Example
insights: Uses @tanstack/react-virtual with useVirtualizer hook. count, estimateSize, getScrollElement, overscan props. Handles 100k+ rows at 60fps. Pair with @tanstack/react-query for server-side data.

title: TanStack Table — Virtualization Guide
insights: Virtualization guide covering row virtualization, column virtualization, and infinite scrolling. Explains pairing with @tanstack/react-virtual for windowing. Key pattern: tableContainerRef as scroll element.

title: shadcn/ui CLI 3.0 and MCP Server — August 2025
insights: CLI 3.0: namespaced registries (@registry/name format), view before install, search, list commands. MCP server for AI agents to discover and install components. Registry resolution engine rewritten. Direct EAIP relevance: MCP server enables automated component scaffolding.

title: shadcn/ui Calendar — react-day-picker Based
insights: Built on react-day-picker. Composable Calendar component. Accepts timeZone prop. Used inside shadcn/ui DatePicker (Calendar + Popover). Multiple/range selection modes. shadcn wraps react-day-picker in its own styled component you own.

title: shadcn/ui Combobox — Built on cmdk
insights: shadcn Combobox uses cmdk under the hood inside a Popover. Supports search/filter, async loading pattern, multi-select pattern. Full copy-paste source available. Shows the pattern for searchable selects elite products use.

title: shadcn/ui Data Table — Official Guide with TanStack
insights: Official shadcn data table guide. Combines Table (HTML) + TanStack Table (logic). Covers: column definitions, sorting, filtering, pagination, row selection, column visibility. Foundation pattern for all data-heavy views in the project.

title: shadcn/ui Drawer — Built on Vaul
insights: Uses Vaul. Bottom drawer with snap points. Swipe-to-dismiss. Mobile-first replacement for Dialog on small screens. Same API as Dialog but slides up from bottom. Essential for mobile HR workflows: candidate quick view, job detail sheet.

title: shadcn/ui Input OTP Component
insights: Copy-paste OTP input built on input-otp by @guilherme_rodz. Pattern, maxLength, REGEXP_ONLY_DIGITS_AND_CHARS. Groups and separators. Slot-based composable API. Essential for 2FA flows in HR systems.

title: shadcn/ui Sidebar — Composable Navigation System
insights: Full composable sidebar system: SidebarProvider, Sidebar, SidebarHeader, SidebarContent, SidebarGroup, SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuItem, SidebarMenuButton, SidebarTrigger, SidebarInset. useSidebar hook for state. Mobile-responsive with Sheet fallback. Critical for HR dashboard layout.

title: Uppy — Modular File Uploader with Resume and Cloud Storage
insights: Resumable uploads (tus protocol), chunked uploads, drag and drop, progress tracking. Plugins for AWS S3, Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive. React component and hooks available. Dashboard, DragDrop, StatusBar, FileInput plugins composable. Best choice for production file upload in HR (CV upload, documents).

title: Vercel Geist Design System — Official Documentation
insights: Vercel's internal design system. High contrast accessible color system. Developer-tool focused components (code blocks, terminal, deployments status, activity feeds). Icon set for developer tools. Reference implementation of a SaaS product design system. Not fully open source for components.

title: AG Grid — Community vs Enterprise Features
insights: Enterprise starts at $999/dev/year. Enterprise-only: row grouping, aggregation, pivot, Excel export, server-side row model (SSRM), tree data, clipboard, column menu. Community: sorting, filtering, pagination, selection — free. AG Grid handles 100k+ rows through virtualization. The gold standard for complex data grids.

title: Mantine React Table — Full-Featured TanStack Table + Mantine
insights: Fork of Material React Table using Mantine v7 instead of MUI. Same feature set: aggregation, grouping, editing, virtualization. Better fit for Mantine-based projects. 4 editing modes: cell, row, modal, table.

title: Material React Table v3 — Full-Featured TanStack Table + MUI
insights: TanStack Table v8 + Material UI v6 wrapper. Aggregation, grouping, filtering, editing (CRUD inline/modal), virtualization, column pinning, fuzzy search, row drag-and-drop. Smaller bundle than AG Grid. Good middle ground between headless TanStack and full AG Grid.

title: Radix UI Slider — WAI-ARIA Compliant Range
insights: Follows WAI-ARIA Slider design pattern. Keyboard navigation: ArrowLeft/Right/Up/Down, Home/End. Multiple thumbs. Step, min, max, inverted props. CSS custom properties for styling. Used in shadcn/ui Slider component.

title: Radix Themes 3.0 — Pre-styled Component Layer on Radix Primitives
insights: Themes 3.0 (2025) adds dashboard and data-heavy interface components: DataList, Segmented Control, Skeleton, Tab Nav, Radio Cards. Built on Radix Primitives with their own polished visual layer. Custom brand palette tool for generating color config.

title: Tremor — Copy-Paste Dashboard Components (Acquired by Vercel)
insights: Vercel acquired Tremor in 2025. All products now free and open source. 35+ components + 300 blocks. Specialized for data dashboards: AreaChart, BarChart, DonutChart, LineChart, SparkBar, KPI cards, BarList, Tracker. Built on Radix UI + Tailwind. Copy-paste approach like shadcn.

title: Zag.js — Finite State Machines for UI Components
insights: Framework-agnostic UI behavior layer. React hooks (@zag-js/react), Vue (@zag-js/vue), Solid (@zag-js/solid). XState-inspired but simpler API. Each machine handles keyboard navigation, focus management, ARIA attributes. Foundation layer under Ark UI. Predictable, testable component logic.

title: Base UI Autocomplete — Free-form Text with Suggestions
insights: Unlike Combobox, Autocomplete allows free-form text (suggestions are optional). Named slots: Input, Popup, Option. Keyboard completion. Good for skills autocomplete in candidate profiles where new values are allowed.

title: Base UI Combobox — MUI Headless Combobox
insights: Unstyled combobox from MUI Base UI v1. Named slots: Root, Input, Popup, Listbox, Option. Full keyboard navigation: arrow keys, Home/End, Escape. Filter logic included. Better than Downshift API per InfoQ analysis. Key component for search-as-you-type HR workflows.

title: Base UI Context Menu — Right-Click Menu
insights: Context menu on right-click or long press. Not available in Radix Primitives (gap). Base UI v1 fills this gap. Named slots: Root, Trigger, Portal, Positioner, Popup, Item, Group, Separator. Important for candidate table actions (right-click to edit/delete/view).

title: Chakra UI v3 Announcement — Architecture Changes
insights: Open compound components, recipe-based variants (Panda CSS inspired), CSS animations (no framer-motion), RSC support, Ark UI foundation. Unification with Park UI ecosystem. 25+ new components added. Migration guide from v2.

title: Microsoft Fluent UI React v9 — Teams and Office Components
insights: Fluent UI React v9 (Fluent 2). Used in Teams, Office 365, Azure Portal. Components: Accordion, Avatar, AvatarGroup, Badge, Button, Card, Input, Textarea, Select, Combobox, Dropdown, Switch, Slider, SpinButton, ProgressBar, Toast, Toolbar, Tooltip, DataGrid (enterprise). Griffel CSS-in-JS runtime styling.

title: react-hotkeys-hook — Keyboard Shortcuts Hook
insights: useHotkeys hook. Scoped hotkeys, component-focused refs. Mod+K pattern for command palette. Vim-style sequences. isHotkeyPressed utility. Active maintenance (updated Feb 2026). Essential pairing with cmdk for keyboard-first HR workflows.

title: material-react-table GitHub — 4k+ Stars
insights: 4k+ stars. Active development. Written in TypeScript from ground up. Full CRUD with 4 editing modes. Row drag-and-drop via @dnd-kit. Column drag-and-drop for reordering. Export to CSV/Excel. Reference for full-featured open source data grid.

title: Embla Carousel GitHub — 6k+ Stars
insights: 6k+ stars. Active development. Plugin system: AutoPlay, Fade, AutoScroll, ClassNames, WheelGestures. embla-carousel-react is the React wrapper. Used as the default carousel in shadcn.

title: react-loading-skeleton — Auto-Sized Skeleton Loader
insights: Automatically sizes to correct dimensions (no manual pixel matching). SkeletonTheme for consistent baseColor/highlightColor/duration. Pulse animation by default, wave option. Best paired with React Suspense. Works with Tailwind animate-pulse as alternative.

title: input-otp — Accessible OTP Input Component
insights: Accessible OTP input. Used in shadcn/ui InputOTP and HeroUI. Invisible sibling input trick for screen reader accessibility. Auto-focus, paste handling, pattern validation. Composable: InputOTP, InputOTPGroup, InputOTPSlot, InputOTPSeparator.

title: microsoft/fluentui GitHub — 18k+ Stars
insights: 18k+ stars. Fluent UI React (v8 legacy), Fluent UI Web Components, Fluent UI React Native. Active development across all packages. v8 EOL July 2025 — v9 is current. Large enterprise adoption (Microsoft products).

title: primefaces/primereact GitHub — 7k+ Stars
insights: 7k+ stars. Monthly releases. v11 active. Rich theme ecosystem (35+ themes). PrimeIcons bundled. Virtual Scrolling in DataTable via VirtualScroller component. Context Menu, TreeTable, Timeline, MegaMenu — rare components not found in shadcn/antd.

title: tablecn — shadcn Table with Server-Side Sort/Filter/Paginate
insights: shadcn table with full server-side capabilities. Uses nuqs for URL state. PostgreSQL integration via Drizzle ORM. Shows how elite products handle pagination: URL-driven state, shareable links, back-button support.

title: tailwindlabs/headlessui GitHub
insights: 27k+ stars. Maintained by Tailwind Labs. Regular releases. React v2 uses render props + hooks. Works without Tailwind (pure utility-class agnostic). Foundation for Tailwind UI library.

title: Headless UI — Tailwind Labs Accessible Components
insights: From Tailwind Labs. Unstyled, accessible. React and Vue. Components: Menu, Listbox, Combobox, Switch, Disclosure, Dialog, Popover, RadioGroup, Tabs, Transition. Designed to work with Tailwind CSS. Simpler API than Radix but fewer components. Used in Tailwind UI components (paid).

title: HeroUI Pagination — Accessible React Aria Based
insights: Built on React Aria Button. nav[aria-label=pagination] + role=navigation. aria-current=page on active. focus rings via :focus-visible. Tab keyboard navigation. Compact variant for mobile. Loop prop for cyclic navigation.

title: Mantine v7.15 Changelog
insights: Latest v7 changes. RichTextEditor subtle variant. Ongoing active development. Mantine has 90+ components including the full Dates package, Tiptap RTE, Charts (recharts-based), and Notifications.

title: Mantine Dates Package — Getting Started
insights: @mantine/dates has Calendar, DateInput, DatePickerInput, DateTimePicker, DateRangePicker, MonthPickerInput, YearPickerInput, TimeInput. One of the most complete date/time input suites in open source React.

title: MUI Pagination — Standard Enterprise Pagination
insights: Controlled + uncontrolled. count, page, onChange. Compact variant. Rounded variant. Size: small/medium/large. usePagination hook for custom UI. Screen reader: aria-label per page, nav wrapper. Works seamlessly with MUI DataGrid.

title: MUI X TimePicker — Desktop and Mobile Variants
insights: DesktopTimePicker, MobileTimePicker, TimePicker (adaptive). 12h/24h format. Minutes, hours, seconds. Timezone support via adapter. Controlled + uncontrolled. Works inside forms with React Hook Form. Premium tier but widely licensed.

title: MUI X — Date/Time Pickers with UTC and Timezones
insights: Timezone support via AdapterDayjs with dayjs-timezone plugin, or AdapterLuxon. TimezoneSelect integration. Critical for multinational HR platforms with global candidates.

title: Park UI — Ark UI + Panda CSS Design System
insights: Beautifully designed components built with Ark UI and Panda CSS. Supports React, Vue, Solid. Theme editor. Figma Kit. shadcn alternative for Panda CSS users. Cross-framework compatibility makes it unique.

title: Shopify Polaris React — Full Component Catalog
insights: Deprecated in favor of Polaris Web Components (Oct 2025). But React implementation still relevant for reference patterns. IndexTable, ResourceList, ActionMenu, Frame with navigation, Toast, Banner — all enterprise-tested on millions of real Shopify merchants.

title: react-dropzone — Simple HTML5 Drag-Drop Zone Hook
insights: Simple useDropzone hook. Does NOT handle upload — just drag/drop zone logic. 45k+ weekly downloads. Headless — you control the UI. Pair with Axios/fetch for actual upload. Good for lightweight cases; use Uppy for full production uploader.

title: React Hotkeys Hook — Documentation and Examples
insights: Full API docs. useHotkeys(keys, callback, options, deps). Scopes for hotkey namespacing. enableOnFormTags for form hotkeys. Ref-based focus scoping. Mod key for cross-platform. isHotkeyPressed for conditional logic. Active (updated Feb 2026).

title: React Select — Feature-Rich Async Select with Tags
insights: Multi-select, async loading, creatable, grouped options, custom components. 27k+ stars. Accessible. Works with React Hook Form via Controller. Downside: large bundle. Best use case: complex async combobox (search candidates as you type). For simple select, use shadcn Select.

title: React Aria ColorPicker — Full Suite
insights: Complete color picker system: ColorArea (2D hue/saturation), ColorSlider (channel), ColorWheel (hue circle), ColorField (hex/channel text input), ColorSwatch (preview), ColorSwatchPicker (palette). Most complete accessible color picker in any React library.

title: React Aria useSlider — Accessible Range Slider
insights: useSlider + useSliderThumb hooks. ARIA slider role with aria-valuetext. Keyboard: arrow keys, Page Up/Down, Home/End. Multi-thumb support for ranges. Works with any styling. More correct than most slider libraries regarding ARIA spec.

title: Fluent UI React Storybook — Full Component Catalog
insights: Interactive catalog of all Fluent UI React v9 components. Live prop editing. Shows Microsoft Teams-scale component usage. DataGrid with cell navigation, row selection, multi-sort. SpinButton (accessible number input). TeachingPopover for onboarding flows.

title: TanStack Table — Column Pinning Sticky Example
insights: Official example for sticky column pinning with CSS position:sticky. Requires z-index coordination. Works with virtualization. Pattern for freezing ID/Name columns in candidate tables.

title: TanStack Table — Virtualized Columns Example
insights: Horizontal column virtualization. Different strategy than row virtualization: needs column offsets. Uses columnVirtualizer with horizontal scroll. Essential for wide HR tables: many candidate attributes visible simultaneously.

title: shadcn/ui npx shadcn create — December 2025
insights: npx shadcn create: pick component library, icons, base color, theme, fonts. 5 new visual styles. Customization at project creation time. Marks evolution from fixed-style library to configurable starter.

title: Vercel Acquires Tremor — All Products Free
insights: Acquisition confirms Vercel's strategy around open source component ecosystems (also acquired shadcn/ui creator). 16k+ GitHub stars, 300k monthly downloads at time of acquisition.

title: AG Grid Column Pinning Documentation
insights: Column pinning to left or right via pinned attribute in column definition. Essential for wide data tables in HR dashboards. Key feature for candidate comparison tables.

title: AG Grid Row Grouping — Enterprise Feature
insights: Row grouping via rowGroup:true in column definition. Row Group Panel for user-driven grouping via drag and drop. Server-side row model supports grouping at scale. Critical for HR dashboards: group candidates by department, job, score range.

title: Downshift — WAI-ARIA Combobox Primitives
insights: useSelect, useCombobox, useMultipleSelection hooks. Maximum composability. WAI-ARIA pattern implemented correctly. Active maintenance (v9.3.2). Lower-level than react-select — you build the UI. Used by MUI Autocomplete internally.

title: Embla Carousel — Lightweight Touch Carousel
insights: Dependency-free, library-agnostic. 800k+ weekly downloads. Fluid motion, precise swipe. React wrapper: embla-carousel-react. shadcn/ui Carousel is built on Embla. SSR support for Next.js. Auto cleanup on unmount. Loop, autoplay, fade, wheel-scroll plugins.

title: Base UI v1 Launch — InfoQ Coverage
insights: Launch analysis: 35 accessible components, named slots system, long-term maintenance commitment from MUI. Highlights Context Menu as missing from Radix, and Autocomplete as superior to Downshift for new projects.

title: react-loading-skeleton npm — 1M+ Weekly Downloads
insights: 1M+ weekly downloads. SkeletonTheme provider. Wave and pulse animations. Automatically sizes based on surrounding text. Widely used as standard skeleton approach in React. Alternative: Tailwind CSS animate-pulse class (no extra dependency).

title: react-phone-number-input — International Phone Input
insights: International phone number input with country flag selector. libphonenumber-js validation. Country selector with search. Supports all locales. Critical for multinational HR: French phone (+33) and international candidate contacts.

title: Polaris Unified 2025 — Web Components Era
insights: Shopify migrating from React to Web Components in Polaris. Smaller, faster, framework-agnostic. Works with any framework or none. Lesson: design systems are decoupling from React. Polaris web components available at shopify.dev.

title: Yet Another React Lightbox — Modern Lightbox 2025
insights: Modern performant lightbox. Keyboard navigation, touch/mouse/touchpad. Captions, thumbnails, fullscreen, zoom, slideshow plugins. Accessible. React 18 compatible. Named after being the better version of the crowded lightbox space.

title: Zag.js Introduction — State Machine Approach
insights: Each component is a finite state machine with defined states and transitions. No invalid states possible. Fully tested behavior. Framework adapters bridge machines to React/Vue/Solid. Pre-built machines: accordion, combobox, date-picker, dialog, file-upload, hover-card, menu, pagination, popover, progress, radio-group, range-slider, rating-group, select, slider, splitter, tabs, tags-input, timer, toggle, tooltip.

title: Flowbite React — Tailwind Component Library
insights: 32+ open-source components. Built on Tailwind CSS. Dark mode built-in. Accordion, Alert, Badge, Banner, Breadcrumb, Button, Card, Carousel, Clipboard, Datepicker, Drawer, Dropdown, FileInput, Footer, Forms, Gallery, Jumbotron, KBD, List, Modal, Navbar, Pagination, Progress, Rating, Sidebar, Spinner, Table, Tabs, Timeline, Toast. v0.12+ active.

title: react-timeline-gantt — Virtualized Gantt/Timeline
insights: Virtual rendering Gantt chart. Handles large datasets via virtualization. Task bars, dependencies, zoom levels. Open source. Lighter alternative to enterprise Gantt libraries. Good for recruitment pipeline timeline view.

title: react-input-mask — Phone and Date Masking
insights: 585k weekly downloads. 2.3k stars. Mask string approach: 9=digit, a=letter, *=alphanumeric. Phone: +1 (999) 999-9999. French phone: +33 (0)9 99 99 99 99. IE8+ compatible. Best for simple fixed masks; for dynamic masks use @react-input/mask.

title: react-range — Accessible Range with Custom Marks
insights: Accessible range input following ARIA patterns. Render props for full customization. Multiple thumbs support. Custom marks and labels. Works independently of any styling framework. Good alternative when Radix/Aria is too heavy.

title: React Spinners — 25+ Spinner Variants
insights: 25+ spinner types: ClipLoader, BeatLoader, BarLoader, BounceLoader, etc. Color, size, loading props. Lightweight. CSS-based animations. Standard loading indicator for async operations in HR dashboard.

title: lightGallery — React Image Gallery and Carousel
insights: React component for image/video gallery with lightbox. Pinch-to-zoom, rotate, flip, social sharing, animated thumbnails. Touch and keyboard navigation. Responsive. For HR: candidate profile photos, document previews.

title: react-timezone-select — Timezone Selector Component
insights: DST-aware timezone selector. Built on react-select. Search by city or timezone name. Auto-detects user timezone. Companion for time pickers in scheduling modules. Key for HR scheduling across time zones.

title: Best React Chart Libraries 2025 — LogRocket Roundup
insights: Recharts: SVG-only, simple API, 20k stars. Nivo: SVG+Canvas+HTML, responsive, larger bundle. Victory: accessible with ARIA. Chart.js with react-chartjs-2. ECharts for complex. Recommendation: Recharts for dashboards (matches antd), Nivo for complex visualizations. Tremor wraps Recharts.

title: Badges vs Chips vs Tags vs Pills — Design Pattern Guide
insights: Definitional clarity: Badges=static status indicators, Tags=static/interactive labels, Chips=interactive selections/filters, Pills=rounded badges. Elite design systems are explicit: don't mix static and interactive visual styles. 48px minimum touch target. 8px spacing between interactive elements.

title: WorkOS — Radix vs shadcn/ui Explained
insights: WorkOS (Radix maintainers) explain: Radix = logic + accessibility, shadcn = Radix + Tailwind CSS + copy-paste distribution. Not competing — complementary. shadcn is a distribution layer on top of Radix. Key insight: shadcn has no breaking changes because you own the code.

title: Best Design System Examples 2025 — Elite Patterns
insights: Covers Polaris, Primer, Carbon, Spectrum, Fluent, Lightning (Salesforce), Material. Common elite traits: Figma→code sync, token-based theming, pattern documentation beyond components, content guidelines, accessibility first principles, versioned changelog.

title: Ashby Engineering — Why We Chose TipTap
insights: Real engineering blog from ATS company using TipTap for job descriptions. Documents migration from another editor. Covers custom extensions, mention extensions, AI writing integration. Practical patterns for HR applications.

title: ARIAKit at React Advanced 2025 — WCAG Without Expertise
insights: Aurora Scharff's React Advanced 2025 talk. Ariakit enables WCAG-compliant custom components without deep a11y expertise. React 19 integration demo. WCAG 2 legally mandatory in EU from June 28, 2025. Key compliance driver for HR software.

title: React UI Libraries 2025 — Full Comparison Matrix
insights: Comprehensive comparison: shadcn (copy-paste, Radix+Tailwind), Radix (headless), Mantine (full ecosystem), MUI (Material), Chakra v3 (recipe-based). Bundle sizes, component counts, theming approaches, RSC support, TypeScript quality. Decision framework for design system selection.

title: shadcn vs MUI vs Ant Design — Complete Comparison 2026
insights: Three-way comparison. shadcn: no bundle, full code ownership, Tailwind-native, best for custom SaaS. MUI: 90KB+, Material Design, largest ecosystem, MUI X for advanced. antd: 60+ components, enterprise-proven, Alibaba-scale, best data tables free. Each excels in different context.

title: Best React Select Component Libraries — LogRocket 2025
insights: react-select (27k stars, async, creatable), Downshift (WAI-ARIA primitives), Choices.js (lightweight 20KB), react-selectize (tags + AJAX). Each for different use case. React-select for complex multi-select with async, Downshift when building custom UI.

title: Popper vs Floating UI — Migration Guide
insights: Floating UI is the evolution of Popper 2 by the same author. Same positioning engine, smaller footprint, better React hooks API. Supports React Native and Canvas (Popper was DOM-only). All major libraries (Radix, MUI, Tippy.js) have migrated to Floating UI.

title: React Toast Libraries Compared 2025 — LogRocket
insights: Sonner (2-3KB, zero deps, shadcn default), React Hot Toast (5KB, simple API), React-Toastify (full-featured, older), NotiStack (best for many simultaneous). Verdict 2025: Sonner for new projects, especially shadcn ecosystem.

title: Top React Date Pickers Comparison — LogRocket
insights: Covers react-datepicker, react-day-picker, MUI X, Mantine, react-date-range (unmaintained). react-datepicker: 7M+ downloads/week, feature-rich. react-day-picker: WCAG AA, shadcn default calendar. Recommendation: react-day-picker for accessibility-focused projects.

title: Virtualized Table: TanStack Virtual + React Query + shadcn
insights: Full recipe: TanStack Virtual + TanStack Query + shadcn/ui Table components. useVirtualizer for rows, useInfiniteQuery for data fetching. Shows the complete pattern for enterprise candidate lists with 10k+ records and server-side pagination.

title: Top 5 React Drag-and-Drop Libraries 2025
insights: dnd-kit (10KB, WCAG 2.1 AA), hello-pangea/dnd (react-beautiful-dnd fork, maintained), pragmatic-drag-and-drop (Atlassian), react-dnd (lower level), react-sortable-hoc (deprecated). dnd-kit is the clear winner for new projects.

title: react-window vs react-virtuoso — Virtualization Comparison
insights: react-window (bvaughn): lightweight, fixed and variable sizes. react-virtuoso: dynamic heights, grouping, sticky headers built-in, infinite scroll. react-virtuoso has better DX for complex lists. @tanstack/react-virtual: most composable, used with TanStack Table.

title: Makers Den — React UI Libraries Comparison Matrix 2025
insights: Side-by-side: bundle sizes, TypeScript quality, RSC support, dark mode, theming. shadcn: no bundle (owns code), Mantine: 40-60KB, MUI: 90KB+, Chakra: 50KB. RSC: shadcn/HeroUI/Base UI — yes, Mantine/MUI — partial, Chakra v2 — no (v3 yes).

title: TipTap vs Lexical — Architecture Comparison
insights: TipTap: ProseMirror-based, best DX, extensions for mentions/tables/code/collab. Lexical: Meta, faster DOM updates, smaller core, newer. Lexical better for performance-critical apps. TipTap better for feature-rich editors with collaboration.

title: Ant Design vs shadcn/ui — 2025 Comparison
insights: antd: 60+ components, enterprise patterns, dense data tables, Alibaba-tested. shadcn: Tailwind-based, full code ownership, no breaking changes. antd for data-heavy enterprise (ERP, finance). shadcn for custom SaaS. Both valid for RH-OptimERP — different layers possible.

title: Top React Gantt Chart Libraries Compared 2026
insights: SVAR Gantt (free + PRO), Syncfusion Gantt, DHTMLX Gantt, Bryntum Gantt. Most are commercial for enterprise. SVAR v2.4+ has: auto-scheduling, split tasks, critical path, non-linear calendar, export. Free tier available. For HR: employee scheduling, recruitment timeline.

title: DataGrid Comparison 2025 — AG Grid vs MUI X vs TanStack vs Infinite Table
insights: 4-way comparison. MUI X DataGrid positioned between TanStack (minimal) and AG Grid (maximal). Infinite Table is newer entrant with good perf. MUI X has a free tier and paid tier (column grouping, row grouping behind paywall).

title: React Accessibility Best Practices — WCAG 2.2 Guide
insights: WCAG 2.2 AA patterns for React. Tools: eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y, @axe-core/react, @testing-library/jest-dom. Focus management patterns. ARIA live regions for dynamic updates. Dynamic React updates can break ARIA states — requires key prop strategy.

title: React Hook Form vs Formik — 2025 Comparison
insights: RHF: 12KB, zero deps, 42.8k stars, 2M downloads/week. Formik: 44KB, 7 deps, 34.2k stars, not actively maintained. Clear winner in 2025: React Hook Form. Formik last commit was 1+ year ago.

title: React 19 Form Handling — Server Actions and useFormState
insights: React 19 introduces useFormStatus, useActionState, useOptimistic. Forms now work without JS with server actions. For simple cases, native React 19 may replace form libraries. For complex validation/multi-step/schema, RHF still recommended.

title: CSS Variables and Design Tokens Guide 2025
insights: Design tokens as CSS variables are the 2025 standard. Primitive tokens (--blue-500) vs semantic tokens (--color-brand-primary). Runtime theming without recompilation. Dark mode via prefers-color-scheme or class toggle. React Context + CSS vars = theme change without re-renders.

title: Headless vs WYSIWYG Editors 2025 — Architecture Landscape
insights: Headless: TipTap, Lexical, Slate, Plate, ProseMirror — full control, build your UI. WYSIWYG: BlockNote, TinyMCE, Quill — ready UI, less control. For HR (job descriptions, candidate notes): TipTap headless with custom toolbar is the elite pattern.

title: TanStack Table vs AG Grid — Architectural Comparison 2025
insights: TanStack: headless, 15KB, MIT, full control. AG Grid: batteries-included, 100k row scale, Enterprise license for advanced. TanStack works well under 10k rows with react-window. AG Grid beyond that. Decision guide: TanStack for custom UI + moderate scale, AG Grid Enterprise for finance/analytics tools.

title: better-cmdk — AI-Powered Command Palette
insights: AI chat + action approvals + fuzzy search in one command menu. Extends cmdk concept with AI integration. Hosted AI chat endpoint (free trial). Pattern for AI-assisted HR workflows: natural language candidate search, AI-powered job matching via command interface.

title: 3 Ways to Implement Infinite Scroll in React
insights: IntersectionObserver API (recommended 2025), react-infinite-scroll-component, react-window + onScroll. IntersectionObserver: no scroll event listeners, efficient, modern browser support. Pair with TanStack Query useInfiniteQuery for server-side data.

title: 20 React Datepickers Ranked 2026
insights: Comprehensive ranking methodology. Tests: mobile UX, timezone, range selection, disabled dates, localization, a11y. Top picks: react-datepicker (maintenance), react-day-picker (accessibility), MUI X (enterprise). Filters out unmaintained libraries.

title: Infinite Scrolling in React — IntersectionObserver Approach
insights: IntersectionObserver step-by-step. useRef for last element observation. useEffect for observer lifecycle. Watches DOM, not scroll position. Standard pattern used by Twitter, YouTube, LinkedIn feeds. Candidate list pagination pattern.

title: shadcn vs Radix vs Tailwind UI — Choice Guide 2025
insights: Tailwind UI = paid ($299). shadcn = free copy-paste. Radix = headless. Recommendation: shadcn for full-stack apps, Radix when building your own design system from scratch, Tailwind UI for premium pre-built sections.

title: Page Transitions in React — Motion AnimatePresence
insights: AnimatePresence enables exit animations before component unmount. Route transitions with React Router. Fade, slide, scale patterns. Key pattern: route-level AnimatePresence with motion.div wrapper. Elevates perceived performance in HR multi-step flows.

title: Drag-and-Drop Libraries npm Comparison
insights: @dnd-kit/core: 1.2M+ weekly downloads, growing. react-beautiful-dnd: declining (archived). react-dnd: steady legacy users. react-sortable-hoc: deprecated. Download trends confirm dnd-kit as the winner for new projects.

title: Top 5 React Drag-and-Drop 2026 — Puck Editor Blog
insights: 2026 update: dnd-kit still #1. pragmatic-drag-and-drop by Atlassian as #2 (smaller bundle). hello-pangea/dnd for lists-only use cases. react-dnd for complex tree drag. Puck editor itself uses dnd-kit for page builder drag.

title: Best Multiple Select Components React 2026 — Ranked
insights: 10 options ranked: react-select (most features), Downshift (most accessible), MUI Autocomplete (Material), shadcn/ui Combobox (copy-paste), HeroUI TagGroup (new Dec 2025). For skill multi-select in HR: react-select with createable for new skills.

title: 10 Best shadcn Alternatives 2025
insights: Park UI (Panda CSS), Aceternity UI (animations), Magic UI (effects), Origin UI, Syntax UI, tremor. Shadow Panda (Panda CSS + Radix). Animata. Lists ecosystem alternatives for when shadcn defaults don't fit.

title: Best React Carousel Libraries 2025 — Ranked
insights: Embla (lightweight, shadcn-default), Swiper (feature-rich, 34k stars), Keen-Slider (40KB, SSR), React Slick (legacy but popular), React Multi Carousel. Swiper recommended for full-featured, Embla for minimal/custom.

title: @dnd-kit/core npm — Install Stats and Changelog
insights: 1.2M+ weekly downloads. Steady growth. MIT license. Packages: @dnd-kit/core, @dnd-kit/sortable, @dnd-kit/utilities, @dnd-kit/modifiers. Active maintenance.

title: cmdk npm Package — Install Stats
insights: 1.5M+ weekly downloads. Used by shadcn command component, Vercel, Linear, Raycast. Solid adoption signal for command palette pattern.

title: react-colorful npm — 1.5M+ Weekly Downloads
insights: 1.5M+ weekly downloads. 2.8KB gzipped. Most popular color picker for modern React. Confirmation that tiny, focused, accessible libraries win download share over monolithic solutions.

title: react-hotkeys-hook npm — Install Stats
insights: 200k+ weekly downloads. MIT license. 3k+ GitHub stars. Updated Feb 2026. Zero runtime dependencies. Tree-shakeable.

title: shadcn vs Radix — Subframe Analysis
insights: shadcn for speed with flexibility. Radix when building pure design system from scratch. For most product teams, shadcn gives the right balance. Key: shadcn uses Radix internally, so you get Radix quality without Radix complexity.

title: react-beautiful-dnd — Archived by Atlassian
insights: Archived and deprecated by Atlassian. Migration guide points to @dnd-kit or pragmatic-drag-and-drop. Still 34k GitHub stars but no new features. Any project using this should migrate.
